config.onedrive.readonly_hint: When active, only read operations are allowed (no upload, delete, move, copy, or share)
config.onedrive.auth_desc: OneDrive uses Microsoft's Device Code Flow for authentication. Register a public client application in Azure App Registrations and paste the Client ID below. No client secret is required for public clients.
config.onedrive.client_id_hint: From Azure Portal → App Registrations → Your App → Overview
config.onedrive.tenant_id_hint: Use 'common' for personal + work accounts, 'consumers' for personal only, 'organizations' for work only, or a specific tenant UUID
config.onedrive.auth_instructions: Click Connect, then enter the code shown at the Microsoft login page. The connection will complete automatically.
config.onedrive.auth_waiting: Waiting for authorization — enter the code at the Microsoft login page…
config.onedrive.auth_timeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
config.onedrive.auth_declined: Authorization was declined by the user
config.onedrive.auth_not_connected: Not connected — click Connect to authorize
